compositionPolicy.semantics: Content remains in the accessibility tree; the utility never adds a role or name.
compositionPolicy.focusReveal: Use revealOnFocus only when the hidden child is natively focusable or contains a focus target.
compositionPolicy.advantage: The optional reveal becomes a logical-start Mergora focus surface with literal Canvas, ink structure, and forced-colors mapping.
compositionPolicy.enhancementOptOut: revealOnFocus=false removes the reveal attribute, visual surface, and focus-reveal behavior while retaining accessibility-tree content.
